headline: Oil prices swing higher as Iran targets Gulf production sites
summary: Oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) swing upward on Friday as Iran continues to target oil production sites in the Persian Gulf. Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley sits down with Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland to cover the latest developments in the Middle East conflict, fluctuations in the global energy market, and what volatile oil prices mean for the airline industry.

headline: Delta Stock Up 9.38% This Week But Reddit Sentiment Just Hit 22 Out of 100
summary: Still one of the world’s most notable airlines, Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) sits at $64.83 after surging 9.38% over the past week, yet Reddit’s sentiment score dropped to 22 out of 100 on Wednesday morning, indicating a firm bearish tone. That contradiction is the story. Delta raised its Q1 revenue growth guidance to the high ... Delta Stock Up 9.38% This Week But Reddit Sentiment Just Hit 22 Out of 100

headline: Delta Raises Outlook As Strong Demand Offsets Fuel And Margin Risks
summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) raised its revenue outlook, citing accelerating travel demand. The company reported record bookings and resilient consumer demand despite higher jet fuel costs. Fuel expenses are being affected by surging jet fuel prices linked to conflict in the Middle East. Delta operates a global passenger and cargo network, so shifts in travel demand and fuel costs feed directly into its revenue and expense profile. The latest update highlights that strong sales and record...
